data.title: KBRA launches K-SIM, a web platform for structured credit modeling. Advanced tool to simulate cash flows with clear analytics. Replaces legacy K-PAT.
data.description: In New York, KBRA has introduced K-SIM, a cash flow simulation tool tailored for analyzing structured credit cash flows with comprehensive analytics. The innovative web-based platform enables users to autonomously simulate and assess structured credit transactions using the cash flow analysis engine utilized by KBRA's rating analysts. Replacing the former K-PAT tool, K-SIM signifies a significant progression in KBRA's structured credit offerings, providing enhanced transparency and independence in modeling.

data.title: Zerebro founder, previously believed dead, reveals AI-penned manifesto and new Solana coin, promoting AI-human convergence.
data.description: The manifesto proposes a vision where artificial intelligence and humans will blend biologically, chemically, and surgically to create a new kind of humanity.

data.title: 60 healthcare providers at Logan Health clinics in Montana file petition to form union due to critical staffing shortages.
data.description: In Kalispell, Montana on December 4, 2025, almost 60 healthcare professionals including primary care physicians, nurse practitioners, and physician assistants employed at Logan Health facilities in Northwestern Montana have submitted a petition to the National Labor Relations Board (NLRB). data.title: Middleburg secures $39.1M refinance for Vesta Creeks Run in North Charleston, SC, improving financial position.
data.description: A prominent developer and rental housing operator, Middleburg, has successfully completed a $39.1 million refinancing deal for Vesta Creeks Run. The housing community, situated at 4640 Forest Hills Drive in North Charleston, SC, caters to a workforce and provides affordable housing options. Newmark facilitated the financing through Freddie Mac for Middleburg. This strategic move enhances the financial standing of the property and underscores its robust performance post the implementation of a thorough value-enhancement plan.

data.title: AlidaBio launches EpiPlex™ Duo-Mod™ Service for m6A and Inosine mapping with RNA profiling, helping researchers.
data.description: Today, AlidaBio revealed the introduction of the EpiPlex™ Duo-Mod™ Service in San Diego on December 4, 2025. This comprehensive service provides a combined analysis of m6A and inosine RNA modifications in conjunction with RNA expression in a unified report. Tailored for researchers, the EpiPlex™ Duo-Mod™ Service offers a complete solution for mapping and quantifying these RNA modifications, streamlining the analytical process.

data.title: UiPath reports impressive Q3 results with $411M revenue, $88M operating income, exceeding guidance; analysts optimistic.
data.description: UiPath Inc. (NYSE: PATH) experienced a surge in its stock shares following the release of its positive third-quarter financial results. Analysts are praising the company's performance, with Canaccord Genuity's Kingsley Crane increasing the price target from $15 to $19 and maintaining a Buy rating. UiPath reported revenues of $411 million and non-GAAP operating income of $88 million, surpassing expectations by $19 million and $18 million, respectively. Needham analyst Scott Berg, however, maintained a Hold rating on the stock. Additionally, the company saw an 11% growth in ARR (annual recurring revenue). For further details, the complete story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: ComEd to offer Low-Income Discount program starting Jan. 1, 2026, for income-eligible customers to receive percentage-based discount on energy bills. Created in line with Illinois Climate and Equitable Jobs Act.
data.description: ComEd will be introducing its Low-Income Discount (LID) program on January 1, 2026, in Chicago. This initiative is designed to assist customers in dealing with rising energy expenses by offering qualifying income-eligible individuals a percentage-based reduction on their monthly electric bill, determined by their income level. The program is in accordance with the Illinois Climate and Equitable Jobs Act and demonstrates ComEd's dedication to affordability and customer support.

data.title: Honeyjar secures $2M for AI OS in Communications & PR, aiding workflow efficiency.
data.description: A secure and collaborative workspace called Honeyjar has been introduced, featuring an AI co-pilot that functions as a communication teammate by leveraging crucial data and workflows. The company, based in San Francisco, disclosed on Dec. 4, 2025, that it has successfully raised $2 million in pre-seed funding for its innovative AI co-pilot platform designed for communications and PR professionals.

data.title: Zilliz partners with AWS to use Amazon Graviton for improving performance by 20% and cost optimization.
data.description: A prominent provider of vector databases has utilized Amazon Graviton to boost performance and increase cost efficiency by more than 20%. The announcement was made in Redwood City, California on December 4, 2025. Amazon Web Services (AWS), a subsidiary of Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN), revealed the news at AWS re:Invent. This move marks a significant enhancement for Zilliz in terms of operational effectiveness and financial savings.

data.title: Paramount accuses Warner Bros. Discovery of favoring one bidder, expressing frustration in a letter to CEO.
data.description: In a recent development, Paramount Skydance has reportedly conveyed its displeasure to Warner Bros. Discovery through a letter regarding the ongoing sale talks. The communication was directed to Warner Bros. CEO, where Paramount expresses its frustration over the perceived unfairness in the negotiation process. Paramount alleges that Warner Bros. has neglected fairness in favor of a single bidder. This incident has drawn attention to the sale dynamics between the companies, with Paramount highlighting concerns over the handling of the negotiations.

data.title: Danaher stock gets a Relative Strength Rating upgrade due to improving price performance, according to IBD.
data.description: Danaher's performance has been on an upward trend, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating. The stock has shown significant improvement, reflecting positive numbers and earning recognition in the investment community. This upgrade signifies a positive outlook for Danaher as it continues to demonstrate strong performance in the market.

data.title: CSX stock gets upgraded relative strength rating showing technical performance improvement, future uncertain.
data.description: CSX has received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating its improving technical performance. The stock's rating has improved recently. Will this positive trend continue? It remains to be seen if CSX will sustain its momentum.

data.title: GE Aerospace's Board authorizes a $0.36 per share dividend payable on January 26, 2026, to shareholders of record on December 29, 2025, with an ex-dividend date of December 29, 2025.
data.description: In Cincinnati, the Board of Directors of GE Aerospace (NYSE: GE) has announced a dividend of $0.36 per share for their common stock. This dividend will be paid on January 26, 2026, to shareholders recorded on December 29, 2025. The ex-dividend date is also set for December 29, 2025. GE Aerospace (NYSE: GE) is a prominent player in the global aerospace industry, specializing in propulsion, services, and systems. They currently serve around 49,000 commercial and 29,000 customers worldwide.
